title: EnchantLimits
description: This plugin adds disabling and limits to enchants so you have better control of what your players allowed to use in your sevrer
body:
--- EnchantLimits ---

Adds Disabling and Limiting Enchants in servers that help better control on what Players are allowed to use.

Adds commands like:
/Enchantlimits setlimit <enchant>
/Enchantlimits removelimit <enchant>
/Enchantlimits enable <enchant>
/Enchantlimits disable <enchant>
/Enchantlimits list
